notices.html: World Cup FINAL weekend: the final is Sunday July 19 at MetLife. Expect heavy traffic and transit crowds toward north Jersey and NYC all weekend — keep city plans for another week.

Peak summer picking: blueberries are in full swing and early peaches are starting at local farms — call ahead for the day's crop. THE POLAR EXPRESS Nov–Dec tickets are on sale and sell out by fall. Holland Ridge sunflower tickets usually drop in late summer.

blurbs.terhune: This weekend: blueberry picking should be in full swing and pick-your-own flowers open; early peaches may be starting. Call 609-924-2310 for the day's crop. Store and donuts open 9 to 6, no pets.
blurbs.vonthun: This weekend: blueberry season at the South Brunswick fields — check their crop page or call 732-329-8656 before driving over. Farm market and donuts open daily.
blurbs.hickory: This weekend: mid-summer window — blueberries and possibly early peaches. Small local farm, so call 609-448-0629 for the day's crop before heading over.
blurbs.hollandridge: Nothing to pick this weekend. The sunflower u-pick returns late summer into fall — worth saving for September.
blurbs.locusthall: This weekend: summer crops are reservation-based — check their site for what's bookable (blueberries or early stone fruit) before planning a trip.
blurbs.johnsonscorner: This weekend: blueberry season, with hayrides out to the fields, animals, and soft-serve. Call or check the site for exactly what's pickable today.
blurbs.battleview: This weekend: the spring freeze wiped out most of their stone fruit this year, so likely no picking. Call 732-462-0756 first. Bakery and store stay open.
blurbs.norzhill: This weekend: mid-summer, limited picking. The real draw here is the fall corn maze and harvest barn from September. Call for any current u-pick.
blurbs.alstede: This weekend: blueberries plus summer vegetables and flowers, with animals and hayrides. A 60-minute drive, so check their daily picking list before heading out.
blurbs.howell: Check howellfarm.org/calendar for this Saturday's free program (summer events run most Saturdays, 10 to 4). Closed Sundays.
